rule: sub-regime packets are evidence only and cannot promote a root class without this root gate

Bear.promotion_requirement: signed negative 8h forward root packet separate from Crisis

Sideways.promotion_requirement: low-forward-absolute-return range/chop root packet plus residual bucket

Crisis.promotion_requirement: tail/stress/liquidity-cliff root packet, separate from ordinary Bear

UnknownOrMixed.promotion_requirement: explicit residual bucket, not a tradable accepted class
